title: Domain pack domain.yaml loader proof (NM-5 completion)
problem: Ticket-119 proved safety_notes.yaml drives safety auditor domain guidance checks. The creativity pack still has domain.yaml not loaded at runtime. NM-5 requires proof that the final declarative pack file is consumed by the engine.
acceptance_criteria: domain.yaml is loaded for creativity domain pack at runtime.
At least one existing consumer reads pack-defined domain metadata instead of hardcoded duplicates.
Temp-pack unit test proves different domain config changes runtime behavior.
Golden tests and manual synthnote tests remain green in mock mode.
non_goals: No multi-pack orchestration beyond creativity MVP path.
No public site routing or committed JSON changes.
No cloud providers or live Ollama changes.
rollback_plan: Revert domain.yaml loader wiring; restore inline domain constants.
